{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Skyhunter Iron body
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Skyhunter Iron body]] is a type of [[Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Skyhunter Iron body]] enhances [[Kelsa]]'s senses.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
